project.name: Salam (Khatir) - Elm Flutter App
project.overall_progress_note: Weighted: 5 completed milestones + active/backlog subtask progress

dashboard.current_focus: Phase 1 — MS-3 Architecture Refactor (with MS-3.5 ContentCubit consolidation, MS-AR Feature-First, MS-DA Repository)

phases.title: Architecture Refactor
phases.goal: Reduce duplication, fix cubit explosion, add data layer abstraction, feature-first folders

phases.title: Reader Experience
phases.goal: Make reading delightful: dark/sepia mode, font controls, distraction-free, theming

phases.title: Search & Productivity
phases.goal: Powerful search (categories, history), notes, table of contents, copy/share

phases.title: Quality & Testing
phases.goal: Test coverage (unit + widget + golden + integration), accessibility, pubspec audit

phases.title: Release Preparation
phases.goal: Google Play ready: privacy, about, signing, R8, AAB, store assets, performance

active.title: Architecture Refactoring

subtasks.label: Create ContentPage generic widget
acceptance_criteria: ContentPage is a StatelessWidget accepting (cubit, dataList, backgroundImagePath)
Replaces all duplicated layout logic from khatira1-32 + pre + final pages

subtasks.label: Refactor 34 page files to use ContentPage
acceptance_criteria: khatira1-32, khatira_pre_page, khatira_final_page all delegate to ContentPage
Total page code reduced from ~3,700 to ~300 lines

subtasks.label: Extract Arabic strings to AppStrings constants
acceptance_criteria: All hardcoded Arabic UI strings referenced from AppStrings

subtasks.label: Separate search logic into SearchCubit
acceptance_criteria: searchContent moved from BasePageCubit to SearchCubit
Search page updated to use SearchCubit

subtasks.label: Consolidate 35 cubits into single ContentCubit + Repository
acceptance_criteria: ContentCubit designed: loadPage(int), nextPage(), previousPage(), search(query)
constraints: Depends on MS-AR (feature-first folders) being partially in place

notes: Reduce 34 near-identical page files to a single reusable ContentPage widget
Collapse 35 chapter-specific cubits into 1 ContentCubit (audit §3)
Pair with MS-DA Repository abstraction for testable data access
MS-3.5 added 2026-06-02 per audit recommendation

notes: Absorbed MS-SPLIT (Split Large Files) tasks as MS-8.7 through MS-8.10
13 TODO/FIXME comments to resolve across the codebase

All 8 dead files: string_helper.dart, spacing.dart, media_query_helper.dart (MS-8.2) + links.dart, target_page.dart, result_page.dart, search_page.dart, share_app.dart (MS-8.11)

active.title: Strip NewOrder suffix from model, lists, and generator

acceptance_criteria: Generated variables use List*Order instead of List*NewOrder

data_search.dart updated with new imports and variable names

active.title: Feature-First Folder Migration (NEW — audit §2)

subtasks.label: Migration plan: feature-first folder map
acceptance_criteria: lib/core/ holds shared: theme, routing, constants, services, widgets
Migration order decided: leaves first (home, settings), then features with cubits (khatira, search, bookmarks)

subtasks.label: Create new folder skeleton
acceptance_criteria: Shared widgets identified for extraction (e.g., custom_text_slider)

subtasks.label: Migrate khatira feature (34 pages + cubits)
acceptance_criteria: 34 khatira page files moved to lib/features/khatira/presentation/

subtasks.label: Update routes and verify build
acceptance_criteria: app_routes.dart updated to new feature paths

notes: NEW 2026-06-02 — added from ReleasAudit.md §2
Goal: move from technical-layer (lib/cubit/, lib/view/) to feature-first (lib/features/khatira/, lib/features/search/, etc.)
Must be partially in place before MS-3.5 (ContentCubit consolidation) can finish cleanly

active.title: Data Layer — Repository Pattern (NEW — audit §4)

subtasks.label: Define KhatiraRepository abstract interface
acceptance_criteria: Methods: Future<List<Khatira>> getAll(), Future<Khatira> getById(int id), Future<List<SearchResult>> search(String query)
Khatira domain model defined (vs current KhatiraModelNewOrder which is data-layer)

subtasks.label: JSON conversion script (static text → JSON assets)
acceptance_criteria: JSON schema matches Khatira domain model
Pub asset bundle configured in pubspec.yaml

subtasks.label: Implement StaticKhatiraRepository (reads JSON)
acceptance_criteria: Loads JSON from rootBundle on first call (cached)

subtasks.label: Wire ContentCubit to repository
acceptance_criteria: Repository returned as stream/state to UI

subtasks.label: Deprecate static list files
acceptance_criteria: khatira_lists/ files removed or kept as build cache (gitignored)

notes: NEW 2026-06-02 — added from ReleasAudit.md §4
Per audit: use Option A (JSON Assets) for now — best balance of static-content benefits + testability
Repository pattern enables future migration to SQLite/Hive without cubit changes
MS-DA.1 (interface) is a hard dependency for MS-3.5 (ContentCubit)

backlog.title: Extra Features

subtasks.label: Table of Contents — visual grid of 34 chapters
acceptance_criteria: Grid/tile view shows all 34 chapters with titles + progress indicators

subtasks.label: Copy Text — SelectableText for all content

subtasks.label: Reading Goals — daily page goal + streak counter

subtasks.label: Multi-language UI — English/Arabic toggle

Content text stays Arabic regardless of UI language
constraints: ⚠️ MS-PUB removed intl previously; will need to re-add

notes: Ship after P2 core features are done
MS-7.4 (Search History) and MS-7.9 (Font Picker) merged into MS-SX.3 and MS-RX.4 respectively to avoid duplication
MS-7.5 (Notifications) needs flutter_local_notifications added to pubspec.yaml
MS-7.7 (TOC) benefits from MS-3 generic widget refactor

backlog.title: Performance & Caching

subtasks.label: Implement lazy loading for khatira lists

Loading states shown while data loads

notes: Profile with DevTools before/after to measure improvement
Target: app launch < 2s, memory < 100MB, smooth 60fps

completed.title: Code Cleanup
completed.summary: Removed dead code, consolidated fontSize into BasePageCubit, cleaned untracked files, updated docs

completed.title: Data Files Standardization & Cleanup
completed.summary: All 9 subtasks auto-resolved by Phase B (generator work). 68 data files (34 lists + 34 text) regenerated. ~2,600 static const fields, 565 KhatiraModelNewOrder entries. --fix-text mode + generator regeneration automated class naming, field typos, type annotations, page markers, dev artifact cleanup.

completed.title: Quranic Font Unification & Tashkeel Correction
completed.summary: Fixed AmiriQ font mismatch, corrected all 766 ayahHadith strings with proper tashkeel from Tanzil.net, standardized ayah numbering to ۝ format, standardized surah name format.

completed.title: Generator Core — Static Text to Elm List Generator
completed.summary: Built tool/generate_elm_lists.dart (669 lines). Parser, page grouping, output writer, main loop, verification against originals, commit. All 34 generated files match originals.

completed.title: Rename elm → khatira across codebase
completed.summary: Renamed 34 static text files, generated renamed list files, renamed cubit files, updated view page imports, renamed model to KhatiraModelNewOrder. flutter analyze clean. 23 generator unit tests pass. Field-level rename (B-1 + B-2 + B-3) renamed 2865 elmText→khatiraText in 34 text files.

agent_log.description: Created milestone "Split Large Files" in backlog
Added task "Split large static text files (19 files >300 lines)" to milestone "Split Large Files"
Added task "Split large elm list model files (17 files >300 lines)" to milestone "Split Large Files"
Added task "Split home.dart into reusable widget components" to milestone "Split Large Files"
Added task "Verify build and analyze after all splits" to milestone "Split Large Files"

Added note to milestone "Split Large Files": Static text worst offenders: elm_text_ders_twenty.dart (768L/52K), eighteen.dart (668L/52K), one.dart (628L/40K), twenty_one.dart (599L/44K), twenty_seven.dart (587L/48K), twenty_five.dart (554L/44K), twenty_three.dart (506L/52K)
Added note to milestone "Split Large Files": Elm list worst offenders: elm_list_20_new_order.dart (750L), 18 (727L), 21 (608L), 27 (555L), 25 (552L), 1 (507L), 23 (504L)
Added note to milestone "Split Large Files": home.dart is the only page file >300 lines (387L/20K) - extract widget components

MAJOR REBUILD 2026-06-02 — applied ReleaseAudit (ReleasAudit.md) integration. Added 5 Phase containers (P1-P5), audit_scores dashboard field, 12 NEW audit-closing milestones (MS-AR, MS-DA, MS-3.5, MS-RX, MS-TH, MS-SX, MS-QT, MS-A11y, MS-PUB, MS-REL, MS-PP + MS-3.5). Moved 5 completed milestones to completed[] (MS-9, MS-QF, MS-GEN-1, MS-GEN-2 + existing MS-1). Cleaned MS-8 (removed duplicate MS-9.4/MS-9.5). Marked MS-GEN-3.1/3.2 as done (auto-completed in MS-GEN-2 field-rename). Fixed overall_progress 6→43. Preserved all 9 agent_log entries and 13 history_log entries. Backup at project-tracker.backup-2026-06-02.json

history_log.action: Initialized project-tracker.json with Phases 3-6 from IMPROVEMENT_PLAN.md. Phase 1 (Code Cleanup) recorded as completed. Phase 2 (Testing) partially done — test file exists for BasePageCubit but data model, widget, and CI tests still missing.

Added MS-7 (Extra Features) backlog milestone with 10 tasks: Table of Contents, Random Khatirah, Copy Text, Personal Notes, Search History, Font Style Picker, Daily Notification, Export Bookmarks, Reading Goals, Multi-language UI.

Planned MS-QF (Quranic Font Unification & Tashkeel Correction) - 6 subtasks: font fix + 4 tashkeel batches + verification. Branch: fix/unified-quran-font-tashkeel. Plan doc: docs/QURAN_FONT_TASHKEEL_PLAN.md. Font: Amiri (fix AmiriQ mismatch). Source: Tanzil.net Uthmanic script. Rules: keep prefix text as-is, standardize ayah numbering to ۝ format, standardize surah names, do not change order arrays.
Started MS-QF.4 (ders 21-32). Ders 21 completed (45 ayahHadith fields fixed). Running automated fix script via alquran.cloud API using Uthmani script. Remaining: ders 22-32 + pre + final.

Completed ders 29 (1 field) and ders 31 (3 fields). Skipped ders 28+32 (no ayahHadith fields). Skipped ders 30 (field is non-ayah phrase). MS-QF.5 changed to in_progress. Next: pre (4 fields), then final (16 fields), then ders 24-27.
Completed pre (4 ayahHadith fields). All pass flutter analyze. Next: final (16 fields), then ders 24-27.

Created milestone "Bug Fixes & Code Quality" (MS-8) with 10 tasks: resolve TODOs, remove dead helpers, fix navigation redundancy, re-enable search, implement getShareText, move UI logic from cubit, split large text files, split elm lists, split home.dart, verify build. Absorbed MS-SPLIT tasks as MS-8.7-8.10. Branch: fix/bug-fixes-code-quality.
Absorbed MS-SPLIT (Split Large Files) into MS-8. Tasks MS-SPLIT_001-004 renumbered as MS-8.7-MS-8.10. MS-SPLIT milestone removed from backlog.

Deep-dive audit completed. Discovered: 8 dead files (453 lines), 3-5 unused deps, 1.2% test coverage, links.dart circular reference bug, 3 dead route constants, HomeCubit.getShareText crash risk. Added 6 new tasks (MS-8.11 through MS-8.16) to MS-8. Plan doc: docs/MS-8_BUG_FIXES_CODE_QUALITY_PLAN.md.

Created milestone "Data Files Standardization & Cleanup" (MS-9) with 9 tasks: standardize class naming, fix list naming/imports, fix field name typos, fix header comments, clean dead code, add type annotations, standardize page markers, fix formatting, verify build. Deep-dive audit of 68 data files completed (34 lists + 34 text files). Branch: fix/data-files-standardization. Plan doc: docs/MS-9_DATA_FILES_STANDARDIZATION_PLAN.md. Order: MS-9 first, then MS-8.

Created MS-GEN-1/2/3 (Khatira Generator & Rename). Instead of manual MS-9 cleanup, a standalone Dart script (tool/generate_elm_lists.dart) will parse static text files and auto-generate elm_list files. Phase 2 renames elm→khatira across 140+ files. Dashboard focus set to MS-GEN-1. Plan doc: command-center/docs/plans/2026-05-30-khatira-generator.md.

Built tool/generate_elm_lists.dart (669 lines). Fixed: page grouping with consecutive same-label delimiters, pre-first fields page handling, bare-number filtering (keep before first worded, discard after), word-based page numbers (page one, pageThree, etc.). Generator runs cleanly on all 34 files. 26 of 34 files match original page counts exactly; remaining 8 differ due to manual subdivisions in originals. Ready for commit and MS-GEN-2 rename.

Phase A (cleanup): A-1 verified Android package com.khatir, A-2 pubspec description elm→khatir, A-3 removed 13 dead routes, A-4 updated 27 tashkeel script paths, A-5 MS-QF.6 verified. Phase B (field rename): B-1 added --fix-text mode to generator (renamed 2865 elmText→khatiraText in 34 text files, standardized page markers, fixed FInal typos, added static const String annotations), B-2 regenerated all 34 list files with --rename-prefix khatira, B-3 wrote 23 generator unit tests (all pass), B-4 updated AGENTS.md, B-5 verified (format, analyze, test all clean). Result: 0 elmText refs in lib/core/data/, 35/35 tests pass, 13 pre-existing tool-only analyze issues.

MAJOR TRACKER REBUILD — Applied ReleaseAudit (ReleasAudit.md) integration. Added 5 Phase containers (P1-P5) aligned with audit roadmap. Added dashboard.audit_scores field (8 dimensions, current vs target 8.75/10). Added 12 NEW milestones closing audit gaps: MS-AR (Feature-First folders), MS-DA (Repository pattern), MS-3.5 (ContentCubit consolidation), MS-RX (Reader Experience), MS-TH (AppTheme), MS-SX (Search UX), MS-QT (Widget/Golden/Integration tests), MS-A11y (Accessibility), MS-PUB (Pubspec/SDK audit), MS-REL (Android Release hardening), MS-PP (Privacy/About/Splash/Icon/Crashlytics). Moved 5 milestones to completed[] (MS-1, MS-9, MS-QF, MS-GEN-1, MS-GEN-2). Cleaned MS-8 (removed duplicate MS-9.4/MS-9.5 entries). Marked MS-GEN-3.1/3.2 as done (auto-completed in MS-GEN-2 B-1/B-3). Merged MS-7.4 (Search History) into MS-SX.3, MS-7.9 (Font Picker) into MS-RX.4. Updated overall_progress 6→43. Review file: RELEASE_AUDIT_INTEGRATION_PLAN.md. Backup: project-tracker.backup-2026-06-02.json

_schema_version_note: Bumped to 2 on 2026-06-02 for release audit integration. Added: dashboard.audit_scores, phases container, is_new/source fields on milestones, completed[] array (was tracked inline), overall_progress recomputed.
